about_quotes.speaker: Jason Marsalis
about_quotes.evidence: that band was Irvin Mayfield’s idea... Irvin called me and said, “I’m going to do – I want to do this gig at Snug Harbor with you and with Bill Summers... So, the first gig we did... we’re signing a contract... we ended up recording.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jason Marsalis — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Phoebe Jacobs and Jackie Harris
about_quotes.evidence: The interviewee does not respond to the interviewer's mention of Irvin Mayfield or the collaboration with Aaron Neville. The name is only mentioned by the interviewer.
about_quotes.doc_title: Phoebe Jacobs and Jackie Harris interviewed by Monk Rowe, Rome, New York, August 21, 2006
